summary: Fixed mobile home Works section overflow by removing negative horizontal margin compensation and adding a Playwright regression.

changed.details: Removed negative horizontal margin compensation from featured-works-section.
Added mobile content rail alignment regression for featured Works section and first card; named the representative phone viewport fixture.
Appended task TODO/progress while preserving existing TODO content.

intentionallyNotChanged: Works card structure, media ratio, typography, and hover behavior
Study Notes and other home sections
Navbar and mobile bottom navigation behavior

validations.result: build passed through frontend next build; default port publishing failed for 127.0.0.1:8080 and 3001

validations.command: BACKEND_PUBLISH_PORT=18080 NGINX_HTTPS_PORT=3002 docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d

PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 PLAYWRIGHT_E2E_PROFILE=exhaustive npx playwright test tests/ui-improvement-featured-works-grid.spec.ts --project=chromium-public --grep "Works stays aligned|Works collapses" --workers=1

risks: Initial red Playwright run was blocked before assertion because standalone dev server could not reach backend on 127.0.0.1:8080.
Default Docker port publishing failed in this environment; compose validation used backend 18080 and HTTPS 3002 overrides.
recommendation: Keep the scoped CSS fix and regression test.
